privileged_info_summary: The task requires creating a hierarchical company structure in Odoo CRM with parent company 'Nexus Global Industries' and two subsidiary companies: 'Nexus Global - Europe' and 'Nexus Global - Asia Pacific'. Two individual contacts are created: 'Elena Rossi' (VP of Sales EMEA) linked to the Europe subsidiary, and 'Kenji Tanaka' (Regional Director APAC) linked to the Asia Pacific subsidiary. All data is synthetic, created for demonstration purposes with placeholder details including fictional addresses and contact information.
